CreateSchedule.description: Grants permission to create an Amazon EventBridge Scheduler schedule

CreateScheduleGroup.description: Grants permission to create an Amazon EventBridge Scheduler schedule group

DeleteSchedule.description: Grants permission to delete an Amazon EventBridge Scheduler schedule

DeleteScheduleGroup.description: Grants permission to delete an Amazon EventBridge Scheduler schedule group

GetSchedule.description: Grants permission to view details about an Amazon EventBridge Scheduler schedule

GetScheduleGroup.description: Grants permission to view details about an Amazon EventBridge Scheduler schedule group

ListScheduleGroups.description: Grants permission to list the Amazon EventBridge Scheduler schedule groups in your account

ListSchedules.description: Grants permission to list the Amazon EventBridge Scheduler schedules in your account

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to lists tag for an Amazon EventBridge Scheduler resource

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag an Amazon EventBridge Scheduler resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag an Amazon EventBridge Scheduler resource

UpdateSchedule.description: Grants permission to modify an Amazon EventBridge Scheduler schedule

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by tag keys in the request
